canonical_architecture_recommendation: Canonical architecture remains the existing honest-slot-contract TwoTower decoder with all plan-aware mechanisms retained as default-off diagnostics. Do not promote or sync checkpoints from E575/E576/E579. Unblock flow/consistency (SLM-157) and second-pack portability only after their upstream dependencies are implemented and measured. The next high-leverage step is a factor-wise oracle-substitution matrix for topology/cardinality/bindings and a versioned hard-valid semantic-contrast corpus.
cross_pack_summary: SPV4-02 audit covers semantic planning, valid-state init/search, scoring/supervision, generation factorization, and portability. All evidence up through SLM-159 is wiring/fixture, blocked, or measured-not-promotable. No mechanism satisfies the criteria for adopt_primary or adopt_optional. The GraphQL pack replication is a retained diagnostic; all second-pack portability is blocked pending real pack implementations.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: A DSL pack cannot populate all factors from its schema/grammar, or the IR silently encodes OpenUI-specific assumptions.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: A pack-neutral SemanticPlanV1 IR captures archetype, role slots, topology, symbols, and bindings independently of DSL surface syntax.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Keep SemanticPlanV1 as the canonical plan contract; require predicted-plan evidence before promotion.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Contract/spec artifact; no predictor claim. GraphQL pack demonstrates factor extraction, but predicted-plan generalization is unproven.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Gold substitution of a factor does not lift downstream semantic metrics, or learned heads are no better than the frequency baseline.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: Learned archetype, role-set, topology, cardinality, and binding heads recover plan factors from the prompt better than frequency baselines and justify downstream semantic gains.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Run a factor-wise oracle-substitution matrix on a real or fixture completion corpus before reopening learned factor heads.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Gold oracle arms provide diagnostic ceilings, but SLM-145 closed without factor-wise gold-substitution evidence for topology, cardinality, or bindings; learned heads are not justified.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Plan-derived seeds are invalid, soft features alter the legal candidate set, or any non-certified prediction removes a supported candidate in a promotable arm.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: A deterministic plan compiler produces valid OpenUI seeds, attaches soft action features without changing legal membership, and gates hard restrictions behind certified evidence.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Integrate with live legal-set oracle and measured completion corpus before promoting beyond diagnostics.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Fixture-only synthetic corpus; no production decoder. Unsafe predicted-hard arm is explicitly non-promotable.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Retrieved prototypes are no closer to gold than the minimal seed, or recovery policies do not improve recovery while preserving correct structure.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: Leakage-safe retrieved hard-valid AST prototypes and conflict-localized repair initialize X22 closer to acceptable programs than a minimal seed.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Evaluate on a real X22 beam-search decode loop with verifier replay before promotion.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Fixture-only evidence; no live X22 model trained or decoded. Oracle and gold-plan arms are diagnostic ceilings only.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: X22 produces materially better semantic outcomes at comparable cost, or plan features silently alter legal candidate membership.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: Direct autoregressive scoring over the live legal action set matches or exceeds plan-conditioned X22 semantic quality at lower deployed cost.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Wire real compiler-owned exact state and live legal sets before claiming a factorization winner.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Wiring-only fixture; no live production decode loop and no ship readiness claim. SLM-154 explicitly labels itself fixture wiring.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: The critic cannot be trained on hard-valid contrasts, factor heads change energy semantics, or abstention is not fail-closed.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: A global energy-based critic can rerank candidate programs using pack-neutral semantic factors without leaking gold structure.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Build or locate the hard-valid contrast corpus and rerun the critic fixture before promotion.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Synthetic fixture corpus only; the SPV2-01 hard-valid contrast corpus is absent from the repo.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Contrasts do not isolate factor regret, or the corruption corpus leaks eval-suite examples.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: Hard-valid semantic contrasts expose factor-specific regret and near-solved corruption curricula that can supervise plan-aware models.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Produce a versioned hard-valid semantic-contrast corpus with n-gram decontamination before using it for training.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: SPV0-03 is a fixture regret diagnostic; SLM-120 is a frontier curriculum plan. No production contrast corpus has been built.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Distillation collapses to the argmax, ignores illegal actions, or fails to transfer outside the synthetic fixture.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: Distilling the dense legal-action set and a teacher-mixture distribution improves data efficiency for small action spaces.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Wire the external teacher scorer (SLM-108) and verifier replay before promoting distillation targets.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Both SPV2-03 and SPV2-04 are fixture wiring only; no external teacher model, solver replay, or checkpoint training was performed.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Repair policy success does not exceed edit-distance baselines, or it requires oracle counterfactual values to rank decisions.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: A learned semantic repair scorer selects verifier-backed counterfactual actions that recover valid programs from partial or corrupted seeds.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Connect to VSS finite replay and measured counterfactual action values before production wiring.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Wiring-only fixture baseline; real verifier-backed counterfactual action values require SLM-131/VSS finite replay.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Recursion changes plans but not final correctness, or deeper non-shared matches it at equal FLOPs.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: A small shared refinement cell applied recursively to SemanticPlanV1 improves plan-factor recovery over a parameter-matched one-pass predictor.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Evaluate recursive refinement on a real decode loop with binding-aware meaning-v2 metrics.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Fixture-only synthetic plan-state recovery; no downstream completion or ship-gate evidence.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: All mixers perform identically on the workload, or simplified references cannot be trained stably enough to separate family effects from noise.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: A narrow sequence-mixer protocol with simplified reference implementations can expose whether non-Transformer mixers preserve task accuracy and improve latency/memory before productionizing a family.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Run the mixer protocol on a representative OpenUI semantic decision task before selecting a production mixer family.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Fixture-only synthetic token-pattern classifier; no OpenUI completion or ship-gate evidence.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: The layer has no measurable impact on verifier-call budget or semantic quality, or it requires SLM-99/148 infrastructure that is not yet implemented.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: A flow/consistency layer propagates plan constraints through the decode state to reject inconsistent partial programs early.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Implement SLM-99/SLM-148 dependencies, then create a fixture or measured matrix for flow/consistency before disposition review.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: Blocked: upstream dependency SLM-99/SLM-148 is not done and the new fixture evidence is wiring-only, so the mechanism remains blocked.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Plan factors cannot be defined from GraphQL schema/selection semantics, or the seed builder cannot reproduce schema-valid queries.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: Pack-neutral SemanticPlanV1 extraction and seed building transfer from OpenUI to GraphQL.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Use GraphQL as the portability reference pack; keep replication as a diagnostic, not a production dependency.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: GraphQL replication fixture succeeds, but it is wiring-only with no predictor claim and no ship-gate evidence.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: The second-pack candidates lack the grammar/parser/oracle/data contract required for non-toy replication.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: The same pack-neutral plan stack transfers to a structurally different second DSL pack (design-patterns, nomenclature, or ontology).
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Implement a real second-pack grammar, oracle, and generator, then rerun the SLM-159 readiness rubric.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: No SLM-44 or SLM-45 pack is registered; only design documents exist. A syntax-only toy pack cannot satisfy the readiness rubric.

mechanism_dispositions.falsifier: Soft scoring changes legal candidate membership, regresses binding-aware meaning-v2, or fails to produce AgentV passes.
mechanism_dispositions.hypothesis: Prompt-derived SemanticPlanV1 soft scoring at decode time can improve local structure without gold output structure.
mechanism_dispositions.next_action: Keep the generalized soft scorers default-off for diagnostics; do not promote or sync a checkpoint until meaning-v2 and AgentV pass.
mechanism_dispositions.rationale: E575/E576/E579 report local/structural gains but are explicitly not promotable: binding-aware meaning-v2 and AgentV remain zero.
